headline: Stay updated with the S&P500 stocks that are on the move in today's pre-market session.
summary: The US market is yet to commence its session on Friday, but let's get a preview of the pre-market session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the early market movements.

raw.headline: Stay updated with the S&P500 stocks that are on the move in today's pre-market session.

headline: S&P Futures Plunge as Inflation Fears Push Bond Yields Higher
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are trending down -0.95% this morning as a jump in oil prices drove Treasury yields higher, abruptly halting the AI-fueled equity rally.
